title: HeadlineInput
description: Input schema for the Headline Engineering workflow. Provides all context needed to generate, score, and evaluate headlines.

page_type.description: The page type or platform this headline will appear on. Determines word count targets, tone calibration, and compliance constraints.

awareness_level.description: Eugene Schwartz awareness level of the target reader. Determines archetype selection, mechanism depth, and directness of promise.

key_benefit.description: The single most important benefit or transformation the headline should promise. Must be specific and concrete, not vague.

target_audience_segment.description: Specific audience segment from the audience-product.md reference (e.g., 'protective parent', 'chronic-issue researcher', 'homesteader/prepper'). Influences identity markers and emotional register.

mechanism_hint.description: Brief description of the mechanism or unique approach the headline can reference or tease. Do not include the full mechanism — just enough for a hint.

beliefs_to_target.description: Which beliefs from the B1-B8 chain (Subsection A) the headline should target or advance. Used for HookBank diversity checking.

archetype_preference.description: Preferred archetypes for headline generation. Optional — if omitted, the agent selects based on awareness level and page type.

emotional_register.description: Desired emotional register per Section 3 Subsection D. Clinical = authority/data-driven. Empathetic = warmth/understanding. Provocative = protective urgency.

quantity.description: Number of headlines to generate. Default is 10 (a standard HookBank). For a single headline, set to 1.

upstream_ad_hook.description: The ad headline or hook that drives traffic to this page. Required for presell and sales page headlines to enforce message match. Not needed for ad-level headlines.

upstream_presell_headline.description: The presell headline that drives traffic to the sales page. Required for sales page headlines to enforce message match continuity.

max_word_count.description: Override the default word count ceiling for this page type.

banned_words_additional.description: Additional words to ban beyond the Section 3 default list.

required_words.description: Words that must appear in the headline (e.g., product name for most-aware traffic).
